name: BlueTap Plumbing & Drain
emergencyScreenQuestion: Any active flooding, sewage, or gas smell?
emergencyExamples: burst pipe, flooding, sewage, gas smell, no water, ceiling collapse

factsLines: - Hours: Mon–Sat 7AM–7PM; Sun emergencies only. Service area: Lynchburg, Forest, Madison Heights, Timberlake VA (ZIP 24501–24506).
- Same-day cutoff 4PM; latest same-day slot 5PM; 30-min buffer; $79 min fee (waived with repair).
prompt.pricingLine: Drain clear $189 · Main line auger $349 / hydrojet $499 (+$150 on-site) · Toilet repair $189+parts / replace $349 customer-unit / $649 BlueTap · Leak diagnosis+minor repair $249+parts (+$79/extra point) · Water heater repair $249+parts / replace 40–50gal $1,399 (+$149 expansion tank) · Garbage disposal $199 / $349 · Faucet/fixture $199 / $349 · Add-ons (offer once): camera +$79, bio-enzyme +$39, tank flush +$99, water test +$49, maintenance $12/mo.
